hypothesis: Full TinyStories-1M tied vocab storage can be compact with rowwise int8, but the full output projection should be streamed from external memory because exact top-k still scans 50257 rows per token and should avoid materializing logits.

commands.failure: bwrap: loopback: Failed RTM_NEWADDR: Operation not permitted
bwrap: loopback: Failed RTM_NEWADDR: Operation not permitted
bwrap: loopback: Failed RTM_NEWADDR: Operation not permitted

commands.cmd: sed substitution write of compact JSON artifact

assumptions.ddr3_example: 16-bit DDR3 at 400 MT/s gives 800 MB/s peak, equal to 16 bytes per 50 MHz cycle before controller overhead

storage_surface.decision: stream the first full-model output head from DDR3 instead of spending about 81 percent of BRAM on the tied vocab table before the rest of the model

burst_layout.payload_region: 50257 aligned 64-byte bursts, one per vocab row

topk_algorithm.state: hidden vector plus one payload burst buffer plus one sidecar burst buffer plus top-k registers
steps: apply sidecar scale into comparable fixed-point score
update top-k with lower token id tie break
topk_algorithm.first_rtl_cutout: top1 first, then widen to top5 after Python replay

staging_plan.cache_note: a hot-token cache does not help exact full-vocab argmax because every row must still be scanned
staging_plan.do_not_do_first: do not integrate DDR3 before a replay scorecard fixes row format, sidecar arithmetic, top-k width, and fetch order

validation.method: static scorecard from checked-in artifacts plus manual arithmetic; sed readback only
validation.hardware_block_reason: no board access in this run

decision.rationale: Full f32 tied storage does not fit on chip. Rowwise int8 fits only by raw capacity and consumes about 81 percent of BRAM, while exact output-head top-k needs about 3.42 MB per token and becomes bandwidth-sensitive above roughly 4 DSP lanes.
decision.next_gate: Recover Python, regenerate this budget from a script, and run deterministic full-vocab top-k replay over 8 samples before DDR3 controller integration.
